name: Johnny Cake Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Beat the egg lightly and add milk to it.
3. Gradually mix the wet ingredients into the dry mixture.
4. Add oil and stir until well combined.
5. Pour batter into an oiled pan.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes.
